summary: Comprehensive testing of 4 critical feature updates in LogiFlow Pro delivery management app. All features verified working: 1) Order Type (Delivery/Pickup) buttons + Free Gift dropdown, 2) Boss Settings split rates (per_delivery_rate/per_pickup_rate), 3) Cancel button on pending orders + Order Type badges on all views, 4) Inventory deletion buttons visible and functional. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing seeded data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 critical feature updates verified: 1) Order Type buttons (Delivery/Pickup) on NewOrder page with visual state changes, Free Gift dropdown with inventory items and $0.00 badge, full order creation with Pickup type works. 2) Boss Settings has split rate inputs (per_delivery_rate=$5, per_pickup_rate=$3) with Active badges, save functionality works. 3) Cancel button (red, with XCircle icon) appears next to Mark Done on pending orders in Service Orders page, cancellation changes status to 'Cancelled' and restores inventory. Order Type badges (blue for Delivery, violet for Pickup) appear on all order views (Service, Driver, Boss). 4) Inventory Delete buttons are prominent red with trash icon and 'Delete' text label, visible for both Service and Boss roles.

feature_1a_order_type.description: Order Type buttons (Delivery/Pickup) present on New Order page
feature_1a_order_type.verification: Delivery button has blue border when selected, Pickup button has violet border when selected

feature_1b_free_gift.description: Free Gift dropdown exists with inventory items
feature_1b_free_gift.verification: Dropdown shows 10 options (including 'No free gift'), selected item shows $0.00 badge, Remove button works

feature_1c_order_creation.description: Full order creation with Pickup type
feature_1c_order_creation.verification: Created order with Pickup type, address, driver, product - redirected to dashboard on success

feature_2a_split_rates.description: Boss Settings has Per Delivery Rate and Per Pickup Rate inputs
feature_2a_split_rates.verification: Both inputs present with Active badges, values editable and saveable

feature_2b_driver_earnings.description: Driver earnings breakdown shows delivery/pickup split
feature_2b_driver_earnings.verification: Earnings summary shows '2 deliveries × $5.00 + 0 pickups × $3.00' format

feature_3a_cancel_button.description: Cancel button on pending orders in Service Orders
feature_3a_cancel_button.verification: Red Cancel button with XCircle icon appears next to Mark Done, 7 cancel buttons found

feature_3b_service_badges.description: Order Type badges on Service Orders page
feature_3b_service_badges.verification: Found 10 Delivery badges (blue) and 2 Pickup badges (violet)

feature_3c_driver_badges.description: Order Type badges on Driver Orders page
feature_3c_driver_badges.verification: Found 6 Delivery badges and 2 Pickup badges, Cancelled status also displayed

feature_3d_boss_badges.description: Order Type badges on Boss Orders page
feature_3d_boss_badges.verification: Found 10 Delivery badges and 2 Pickup badges

feature_4_service_inventory.description: Inventory Delete button visible for Service role
feature_4_service_inventory.verification: 9 Delete buttons found with red destructive styling, trash icon, and 'Delete' text

feature_4b_boss_inventory.description: Inventory Delete button visible for Boss role
feature_4b_boss_inventory.verification: 9 Delete buttons found with same styling as Service view

regression_cancelled_revenue.description: Cancelled orders excluded from revenue calculations
regression_cancelled_revenue.verification: Backend test verified cancelled orders don't increase total_revenue, Boss Dashboard shows 'Finalized sales' from completed orders only
